name: OpenAIModeration
short: Demos the OpenAI Content Moderation API for images
description: A cog that accepts an image URL or attachment, sends it to the OpenAI Moderation API using the omni-moderation-latest model, and displays the results in a formatted embed.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any user data persistently.
install_msg: Thank you for installing OpenAIModeration! Please configure your API key with `[p]set api openai api_key <your_key>` before using.
author: crayyy_zee
